summary: Frontend testing completed for all 3 Visa Wizards. All requested features verified working: 1) Destination field shows country name (Japan), 2) Official visa portal button links to real VFS URL, 3) VFS booking link functional, 4) Hyderabad shows 3 VFS branches (Banjara Hills, Hitech City, Secunderabad), 5) More dates button shows 14 dates, 6) Step 5 has dynamic summary with notification signup, 7) All 3 wizards have fullscreen toggle.
passed_tests: Homepage loads and search for Japan works
Click Self Apply 'Apply Now' button - DIYVisaWizard opens
Destination field shows 'Japan' (not empty) - FIXED with useEffect
Step 3 - 'Open Japan Visa Portal' button exists with external link (https://www.vfsglobal.com/japan/india/)
Step 3 - Visa portal link opens in new tab (target=_blank)
Step 4 - Select Hyderabad city - shows 3 VFS branches
Step 4 - VFS branches for Hyderabad: Banjara Hills, Hitech City, Secunderabad
Step 4 - 'More' dates button shows 14 dates (changes to 'Less')
Step 4 - 'Book on VFS Global' button has external link
Step 5 - Documents count shown in summary
Step 5 - Notification signup form (email + phone inputs)
AgentFinderWizard - Opens correctly with 'Japan - Find Agents' header
AssistedServiceWizard - Opens correctly with 'Japan - Assisted Service' header
critical_code_review_comments: DIYVisaWizard.js: VFS_CENTERS object correctly has 3 branches for Hyderabad
DIYVisaWizard.js: VISA_PORTALS object has real URLs for each country
DIYVisaWizard.js: useEffect correctly updates destination when country prop changes
DIYVisaWizard.js: generateDates function creates 14 dates when showMoreDates is true
All 3 wizards have isFullscreen state with Maximize2/Minimize2 toggle buttons
All external links have target='_blank' for opening in new tab
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 Visa Wizards verified working with new features: 1) DIYVisaWizard destination field now updates via useEffect when country changes, 2) VFS_CENTERS data includes real branch info (Hyderabad has 3: Banjara Hills, Hitech City, Secunderabad), 3) VISA_PORTALS has real URLs, 4) All wizards have fullscreen toggle, 5) Step 5 has application summary with notification signup form.

diy_visa_wizard.destination_field: Shows country name via useEffect (was empty before)
diy_visa_wizard.more_dates_button: Shows 14 dates when clicked (changes to Less)
